title: Connected board column alignment
excerpt: How can we left align the text in a connected board column? It’s currently centered within the field.

posts.author: baileyalexander (Brian)
posts.cookedHtml: How can we left align the text in a connected board column? It’s currently centered within the field.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Bailey! Sorry for the late reply here! At this time, the text cannot be aligned differently than it is in the middle.

If you have any more questions, feel free to message us at support@monday.com! We’d be happy to help!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
